title: Uruguayan Empanada Filling
description: A traditional Uruguayan filling made with tangy ingredients, perfect for baking or frying empanadas.
instructions: Roll out the empanada dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
In a bowl, mix together the mashed chestnut, shredded cheese, chopped onion, and water.
Place a tablespoon of the filling in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half to form a half-moon shape and press the edges to seal.
Brush the tops with a little water and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
